item.title: Released OBS Optimized
item.description: We have released OBS Optimized Pre-Alpha. Enjoy early access and help us reporting bugs.

item.title: Released Aseprite Extensions
item.description: We have released our friendly but powerful Aseprite Extensions. Create beautiful art with Aseprite.

item.title: Legal
item.description: Privacy Policy At PurpleLight Studios, accessible from purplelightstudios.com, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors. This Privacy Policy document contains types of information that is collected and recorded by PurpleLight Studios and how we use it. If you have additional questions or require more information about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us. This Privacy Policy applies only to our online activities and is valid for visitors to our website with regards to the information that they shared and/or collect in PurpleLight Studios.

item.title: About us

item.title: Contact
item.description: We are looking forward to hearing from you. Address: 8 The Green. STE B Dover, DE 19901. Email: info@purplelightstudios.com
